//: D4 (agent-in-the-loop): automate dependency bumps so an agent evaluates them, never blind-merges. Requires enabling the Renovate GitHub App on this repo.

packageRules.description: Safe, low-risk updates can auto-merge once CI (incl. the .ai conformance gate) is green.
Minor/major bumps open a PR for an agent + human to evaluate (changelog, breaking changes).
Cargo (Rust) updates are reviewed manually — cargo-deny already gates supply chain on every PR.
